short_desc: If BLOODAD or CSFAD or FDGAD or TRACERAD or STRUCTAD or BIOMAD1 or BIOMAD2 or BIOMAD3 = 1, ALZDIS should =1

TRACERAD (Other tracer-based imaging - Consistent with AD) =1 or Q7a1. STRUCTAD (Atrophy pattern conistent with AD) =1 or Q8a. BIOMAD1 (Other biomarker modality - Consistent with AD) =1 or Q9a. BIOMAD2 (Other biomarker modality - Consistent with AD) =1 or Q10a. BIOMAD3 (Other biomarker modality - Consistent with AD) =1, then Q12. ALZDIS (Alzheimer's disease) should = 1
test_logic: If (BLOODAD or CSFAD or FDGAD or TRACERAD or STRUCTAD or BIOMAD1 or BIOMAD2 or BIOMAD3) = 1 and ALZDIS not =1
comp_vars: BLOODAD, CSFAD, FDGAD, TRACERAD, STRUCTAD, BIOMAD1, BIOMAD2, BIOMAD3, ALZDIS

full_desc: If Q7a3. STRUCTCVD (Consistent with cerebrovascular disease (CVD)) =1 then Q15. CVD (Vascular brain injury) should = 1

short_desc: If BIOMARKDX=0 and MODED1C ne 0 and any of (DXPLSMABIO, DXCSFBIO, DXAPET, DXTAUPET, INFORISCH, or DXASYN = 1)
full_desc: If If Form D1b Q1. BIOMARKDX (Were any biomarker results used?) = 0 (No) and Form D1c is submitted (MODED1C ne 0) and any of: Q1. DXPLSMABIO (Were plasma biomarkers used in the etiologic diagnosis?), Q2. DXCSFBIO (Were CSF biomarkers used in the etiologic diagnosis?), Q3. DXAPET (Was Amyloid PET used in the etiologic diagnosis?), Q4. DXTAUPET (Was tau PET used in the etiologic diagnosis?), Q5. INFORISCH (Was infarction on MRI or WMH consistent with ischemia or blood products consistent with CAA used in the etiologic diagnosis?), Q6. DXASYN (Was ?Syn-SAA used in the etiologic diagnosis?) =1 (Yes)
test_logic: If BIOMARKDX=0 and MODED1C ne 0 and (DXPLSMABIO =1 or DXCSFBIO=1 or DXAPET=1 or DXTAUPET=1 or INFORISCH=1 or DXASYN=1)
comp_vars: BIOMARKDX, MODED1C, DXPLSMABIO, DXCSFBIO, DXAPET, DXTAUPET, INFORISCH, DXASYN
